prefill_split_info.note: prefill is measured in 3 phases: system_prefill_* covers ingesting the static system prompt, tools_prefill_* covers ingesting the available-tools list, query_prefill_* covers ingesting the dynamic user query. Both system prompt and tools list are treated as pre-processing that happens ahead of the live request in production, so ttft_ms/prefill_latency_ms/e2e_latency_ms cover ONLY the user-query phase (+ decode for e2e); preprocessing_latency_ms is the sum of system_prefill_latency_ms + tools_prefill_latency_ms, reported separately per example. In prefix_cache mode, system_prefill_latency_ms is 0 per example because the system prompt is cached once (see prefix_cache_info) rather than re-ingested every call.

prefix_cache_info.note: cache_creation_ms is a one-time cost amortised over all examples.
